summary: This is a brief linking post directing readers to the author's Bloomberg View column about how data systems can criminalize immigrants. The post itself contains no substantive content beyond the headline and link. The actual analysis and arguments are contained in the external Bloomberg article, which is not included here.
key_points: The post serves as a pointer to external content on Bloomberg View
The title suggests the column examines how data and algorithms can frame immigrants as criminals
No substantive argument or analysis is present in the blog post itself
key_insight: This linking post suggests O'Neil's Bloomberg column explores how data systems can be weaponized against immigrant populations, but the blog post itself contains no extractable analysis.
